parameters.query: WITH d AS (SELECT $1::jsonb j), hasmedia AS (SELECT ((jsonb_typeof(j->'media')='array' AND jsonb_array_length(j->'media')>0) OR (j->>'asset_ig') IS NOT NULL) AS yes FROM d), pz AS (INSERT INTO contenido.piezas (proyecto_id, titulo_interno, notas, canal) SELECT (SELECT id FROM contenido.proyectos WHERE slug=COALESCE(j->>'proyecto','cortafuego')), j->>'titulo_interno', j->>'notas', COALESCE(j->>'canal_pieza','instagram') FROM d WHERE j->>'pieza_id' IS NULL RETURNING id), pid AS (SELECT COALESCE((SELECT id FROM pz),(SELECT (j->>'pieza_id')::uuid FROM d)) AS pieza_id), delmed AS (DELETE FROM contenido.media WHERE pieza_id=(SELECT pieza_id FROM pid) AND (SELECT yes FROM hasmedia) RETURNING 1), rev AS (INSERT INTO contenido.revisiones (pieza_id, nro, estado, canal, formato, caption, web_titulo, web_copy, web_tags, daypart, clima, transito, momento, duracion_s) SELECT (SELECT pieza_id FROM pid), COALESCE((SELECT max(nro)+1 FROM contenido.revisiones WHERE pieza_id=(SELECT pieza_id FROM pid)),1), 'pendiente_aprobacion', COALESCE(j->>'canal','ambos')::contenido.canal, COALESCE(j->>'formato','feed'), j->>'caption', j->>'web_titulo', j->>'web_copy', ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(j->'web_tags')), j->>'daypart', j->>'clima', j->>'transito', j->>'momento', NULLIF(j->>'duracion_s','')::int FROM d RETURNING token), med AS (INSERT INTO contenido.media (pieza_id, orden, tipo, url, poster_url) SELECT (SELECT pieza_id FROM pid), elem.ord, COALESCE(elem.val->>'tipo','image')::contenido.tipo_media, elem.val->>'url', elem.val->>'poster_url' FROM d, LATERAL (SELECT t.val, t.ord FROM jsonb_array_elements(CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof(j->'media')='array' AND jsonb_array_length(j->'media')>0 THEN j->'media' ELSE jsonb_build_array(jsonb_build_object('url', j->>'asset_ig', 'tipo', COALESCE(j->>'tipo_media','image'), 'poster_url', j->>'poster_url')) END) WITH ORDINALITY AS t(val, ord)) elem WHERE elem.val->>'url' IS NOT NULL RETURNING 1), lnk AS (UPDATE contenido.tg_briefs SET pieza_id=(SELECT pieza_id FROM pid), estado='procesado', procesado_en=now() WHERE id=(SELECT NULLIF(j->>'brief_id','')::uuid FROM d) RETURNING 1) SELECT token FROM rev
